All Classes and Interfaces

Class
Description
Dictionary
Dictionary to use in PassPhrased passwords
EntropyUtils
The class that StrengtTools uses to calculate.
HashManager
Utility class for secure password hashing.
HashResult
That object saves hash, salt and iterations of a previously encoded password with HashManager.
InterfaceRandGen
Interface for PasswordGenerator
InterfaceRanPassPhrased
Interface for passphrased password methos
LowercaseLetter
Lowercase util for password generator
MainDemo
Excutable for the demo of crypto sources and analysis sources applicated for a session login (with a local repository) and a session register (looks the entropy of a password for create a user or not)
PassphrasedGenerator
Generate a PassPhrased password with a determinated length
PasswordGenerator
Generates a alphanumeric password
SaltManager
Utility class for generating secure Salts for mix with the password to be hashed
StrengthTools
Tools for evaluate the Strength and Entropy of a password
Symbol
Symbol util for password generator
TimeUtils
Time util for time calculating
UppercaseLetter
Uppercase util for password generator
User
Demo class who simulated a User object.
UserRepository
Demo class who simulate a Users repository.
